input: URGENT: Your Netflix subscription has been paused. Update your payment method at http://netflix-billing.ml/update to continue watching.
notes: Classic brand-impersonation phishing with urgency and suspicious domain.

input: Congrats! You've won a $1,000 Walmart gift card. Claim now at https://walmart-gifts.xyz/claim?token=abc123
Can you pick up milk on your way home?
notes: Benign message with zero scam indicators.

input: Dear customer, your package delivery failed. Please confirm your address and pay a $2.99 redelivery fee.
notes: Delivery scam; lower urgency but still requests small payment.

input: It's Grandma. I lost my purse and need $300 Western Union to get home. Don't tell Mom, she worries too much.
